title: Ratchet Configuration
description: Project-level configuration for Ratchet autoresearch sessions

mode.description: Operating mode for the autoresearch session

never_touch.description: Glob patterns for files that must never be modified during experiments

guard_command.description: Command that must always pass after every change. Empty = use detected test command.

frozen_commands.description: Override auto-detected metric commands. Leave empty for auto-detection.

max_experiments.description: Maximum experiments before stopping. null = infinite (until user stops)

notify_webhook.description: Slack/Discord webhook URL for progress notifications

consecutive_discard_limit.description: Number of consecutive discards before switching strategy

hard_stop_discard_limit.description: Number of consecutive discards before full stop

validator_interval.description: Run validator subagent every N experiments

strategy_rotation.description: Order of strategy rotation when stuck
